category.scope_note: Solar PV inverter comparison for China-to-Sri Lanka export compliance.

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Sri Lanka SLSI standards, IEC 62109 safety, PUCSL/CEB grid-connection and net-metering/net-accounting requirements, 50 Hz grid parameters, and EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与斯里兰卡SLSI标准、IEC 62109安全要求、PUCSL/CEB并网及净计量/净计费要求、50 Hz电网参数和EMC要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與斯里蘭卡SLSI標準、IEC 62109安全要求、PUCSL/CEB併網及淨計量/淨計費要求、50 Hz電網參數和EMC要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLSI scope determination, PUCSL or CEB grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Sri Lanka SLSI, PUCSL, CEB, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLSI适用范围裁定、PUCSL或CEB并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLSI適用範圍裁定、PUCSL或CEB併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Sri Lanka, IEC 62109 safety compliance is the primary technical baseline expected by SLSI and project stakeholders. PUCSL and CEB impose grid-connection and net-metering/net-accounting requirements covering anti-islanding, power quality, 50 Hz grid parameters, and protection relay settings. Chinese GB/T inverter approvals do not automatically satisfy Sri Lanka requirements; importers typically need to demonstrate IEC 62109 test evidence and PUCSL/CEB grid-code conformance.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口斯里兰卡时，IEC 62109安全合规是SLSI及项目各方期望的主要技术基线。PUCSL和CEB对并网和净计量/净计费提出要求，涵盖防孤岛、电能质量、50 Hz电网参数和保护定值。中国GB/T逆变器批准不能自动满足斯里兰卡要求；进口商通常需提供IEC 62109测试证据及PUCSL/CEB电网规范符合证明。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口斯里蘭卡時，IEC 62109安全合規是SLSI及項目各方期望的主要技術基線。PUCSL和CEB對併網和淨計量/淨計費提出要求，涵蓋防孤島、電能品質、50 Hz電網參數和保護定值。中國GB/T逆變器批准不能自動滿足斯里蘭卡要求；進口商通常需提供IEC 62109測試證據及PUCSL/CEB電網規範符合證明。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
